_doc: GENERATED by scripts/bake-hillshade.mjs — provenance for the LiDAR-relief drape texture (assets/hillshade-walferdange.jpg). bbox matches index.html GEO_BBOX so per-vertex UV = lon/lat fraction. Colour-hypsometric hillshade rendering of the bare-earth DTM: modern micro-relief for archaeological prospection context.

hillshade.provider: ACT (Administration du cadastre et de la topographie), Luxembourg
hillshade.note: Hillshaded 0.5 m bare-earth DTM (rendered by the WMS at ~0.85 m/px here). Shows the micro-relief used to hunt funnel depressions of the unlocated shafts (P-2 / P-3 / P-6A) — see BACKLOG geodesy items.
